violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the coffee area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the coffee area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling tiles in the retail area have stains from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

Beverages and whipped cream were observed held at 71-82 degrees Fahrenheit in the walk-in cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the walk-in cooler since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Establishment must not store time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Walk-in cooler must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Per person in charge, repair services are scheduled to come today. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

Hot water was not available in the handwashing sinks and 3-bay sink. Per owner, establishment is in the process of repairs. Please contact inspector when hot water is repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Hot water was not available in the handwashing sinks and 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The person in charge did not know how to sanitize coffee pots. Per person in charge, the person who comes in after him is responsible for washing, rinsing, and sanitizing the coffee pots and that it gets done at the end of the day. Inspector showed the person in charge how to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment using a chlorine sanitizing solution. A handout was given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom and next to the coffee station were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

Food was observed held at 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit in the refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Hot water was not available in the handwashing sinks and 3-bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
